title: Eastern European Fashion Influencer
promptText: Realistic fashion influencer, 28-year-old Eastern European woman, full-body view standing in a cobblestone street of Paris, soft morning light, long flowing chestnut hair, wearing a beige trench coat, high-waisted jeans, ankle boots, subtle makeup, confident posture, DSLR-style photo, cinematic tone, 85mm lens — v 6 — ar 2:3 — style raw
